title: mariadb-devel:10.3 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
asio
[1.10.8-7]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_28_Mass_Rebuild

galera
[25.3.37-1.0.1]
- Bump release for rebuild - x86_64 and i386 need to be built the same day

Judy
[1.0.5-18.0.1]
- Rebuild [Orabug: 31667911]

mariadb
[3:10.3.39-2.0.1]
- Bump release for rebuild - x86_64 and i386 need to be built the same day
